title: List of medical devices for an urgent public health need - Canada.ca
content:
## Authorization of medical devices for an urgent public health need: List of medical devices for an urgent public health need
Date issued: January 3, 2024
- List of medical devices for an urgent public health need
- List of authorized medical devices
- List of medical devices for expanded use
- List of medical devices no longer authorized
This List of Medical Devices for an Urgent Public Health Need (UPHN list) is incorporated by reference in Part 1.1 of the Medical Devices Regulations (MDR).
Health Canada maintains and updates this list as required.
- a medical condition is added to column 1 of Part 1 or Part 2 (subsection 68.1(1) of the MDR) when the Minister has reasonable grounds to believe: the condition presents, or is the result of, a significant risk to public health in Canada immediate action is required to deal with the risk
- the condition presents, or is the result of, a significant risk to public health in Canada
- immediate action is required to deal with the risk
- a medical device is added to column 2 of Part 1 (subsection 68.1(2) of the MDR) when the Minister has reasonable grounds to believe: there is an urgent public health need for the devices for the corresponding medical condition set out in column 1
- there is an urgent public health need for the devices for the corresponding medical condition set out in column 1
- a category of medical devices is added to column 2 of Part 2 (subsection 68.1(3) when the Minister has reasonable grounds to believe: there is an urgent public health need for the devices that belong to those categories for the corresponding medical condition set out in column 1
- there is an urgent public health need for the devices that belong to those categories for the corresponding medical condition set out in column 1
For more information, please refer to:
- Medical devices for an urgent public health need
Access the archived version of this list.
List of medical devices for an urgent public health need
Column 1 Medical condition
Column 2 Name of device
Identifier of device
Column 1 Medical condition
Column 2 Category of medical devices
